title: Billboard render mode (camera-facing quad + custom RenderType: depth test, transparency blend, no lighting)
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1220-1231 (Render modes table: billboard camera-facing 2D sprite, 3d vanilla JSON model)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1240-1242 (Billboard render details: camera-facing quad, custom RenderType, depth test, transparency, no lighting)
acceptance_criteria: Custom RenderType created for billboard bullets: enables depth test, transparency blend (translucent), no lighting, no cull
BillboardRenderer class renders a camera-facing quad (4 vertices) using camera orientation from Camera object
Quad is always perpendicular to camera look direction (sprite billboard effect)
Scale from BulletRenderObject.scale applied to quad size
Position interpolated using prevPosition, position, and partialTick (delegates to interpolation logic from subtask 11)
Rendered via PoseStack + VertexConsumer from MultiBufferSource
